name: rego_lookup
description: Look up a vehicle by its Australian registration plate number. Call this when the customer provides their rego plate. Speak the result back to confirm: 'So that's a 2019 silver Toyota Camry — is that right?' Do not read out the VIN or any compliance data.

plate.description: Vehicle registration plate number, e.g. ABC123 or 1ABC234. Letters and numbers only, no spaces or dashes.

state.description: Australian state or territory abbreviation: NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT. Ask the caller if unsure.
